creator: mons@cpan.org
text:
Approved

On Thu, Jan 26, 2012 at 4:20 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of net/p5-XML-RPC-Fast,
>
> Please note that PR ports/164522 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/164522
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
